meta.title: Com_Moon · Smoked Command Deck
meta.description: A quiet operating desk that wires brand, content, sales, and operations into a single flow.

hero.copy: Com_Moon keeps the trust you build outside and the judgment you run inside on the same page. Public content earns attention, responses become structured leads, and those signals flow back into operating priorities and automation.

trust.detail: Content builds trust, and every response turns into an inquiry and the next concrete action.

signal.detail: Every signal captured in public flows back into sales and operating decisions inside the hub.

mobile.detail: Check numbers, capture ideas, and trigger the next action from a phone without friction.

floatingWindow.label: Operator note
floatingWindow.headline: Push only the topics that already earned a response — operations get sharper fast.
floatingWindow.body: This week's publishing, lead follow-up, and proposal priorities live on the same board.

loop.title: Signals from outside reshape how you operate inside
loop.copy: Public isn't a brochure — it's a sensor. What people responded to, which inquiries showed up, and what to push next should all loop back into the hub's judgment.

content.title: Content Engine
content.body: Turn ideas into card news, posts, and insight pieces that steadily build public trust.

lead.title: Lead Capture
lead.body: No response gets lost. Inquiries and reactions become structured leads with a clear next action.

ops.title: Operating Signal
ops.body: Public outcomes flow back into the hub OS and become the signal for what to push next.

story.title: Not a pretty landing — a landing that shows how you work
story.copy: Com_Moon's public surface can't stop at "here's what we do." The rhythm of content, how responses get captured, and how it all flows back into operating decisions should be visible in the structure itself.

one.title: Build trust outside
one.body: Public content is a sample of how Com_Moon thinks and works, not a billboard.

two.title: Catch responses as leads
two.body: Likes and views aren't the finish line. Record who engaged and what happens next.

three.title: Loop it back into operations
three.body: Content performance and inbound flow show up inside as priorities, automations, and execution state.

workspace.title: An operating preview from public to hub
workspace.copy: Same brand, different pressure. Outside has room to breathe; inside is denser. Not a hard cut — the same material under different light.

signal.label: Signal
signal.title: This week's highest-response topics
signal.body: Brand ops structuring / Content automation / Practical sales flow

useCases.title: The scenes Com_Moon has to do well

intro.title: Turn a services page into operating language
intro.body: Not a pretty brochure — a public structure that makes how you actually work visible.

response.title: Don't lose content responses
response.body: Catch reactions from card news or essays as leads and wire them into the sales flow.

today.title: See what to push today, instantly
today.body: Open the hub and the priority across ops, leads, content, and automation is on one screen.

ctaBand.title: Which problem do you want to hold on to right now?
ctaBand.body: Landing structure, content ops, lead flow, hub OS — we start by sorting out what's blocking you.

footer.description: A public surface and hub OS that wire brand, content, sales, and operations into a single flow.
